attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT ST_CCRM_PROFILES.BATCH_ID, ST_CCRM_PROFILES.PROFILE_ID, ST_CCRM_PROFILES.GLOBAL_DEAL_ID, ST_CCRM_PROFILES.COMPLETENESS_FLAG, ST_CCRM_PROFILES.PROFILE_STATUS, ST_CCRM_PROFILES.PRIMARY_RESERVE_TYPE, ST_CCRM_PROFILES.PRIME_FLAG, ST_CCRM_PROFILES.AGREEMENT_NAME, ST_CCRM_PROFILES.CUST_ID, ST_CCRM_PROFILES.PARTNER_NAME, ST_CCRM_PROFILES.FISCAL_PERIOD, ST_CCRM_PROFILES.START_PERIOD, ST_CCRM_PROFILES.LEGAL_CONTACT, ST_CCRM_PROFILES.CREATED_BY, CAST(ST_CCRM_PROFILES.CREATION_DATE AS TIMESTAMP(0)) CREATION_DATE, ST_CCRM_PROFILES.LAST_UPDATED_BY, CAST(ST_CCRM_PROFILES.LAST_UPDATE_DATE AS TIMESTAMP(0)) LAST_UPDATE_DATE, CAST(ST_CCRM_PROFILES.LAST_ERP_UPDATE_DATE AS TIMESTAMP(0)) LAST_ERP_UPDATE_DATE, ST_CCRM_PROFILES.VERSION, CAST(ST_CCRM_PROFILES.FIRST_INSTALL_DATE AS TIMESTAMP(0)) FIRST_INSTALL_DATE, ST_CCRM_PROFILES.RM_EMAIL_ID, ST_CCRM_PROFILES.PROFILE_SOURCE, ST_CCRM_PROFILES.PROFILE_TYPE, ST_CCRM_PROFILES.THEATER_ID, ST_CCRM_PROFILES.AREA_ID, ST_CCRM_PROFILES.REVREC_STATUS, ST_CCRM_PROFILES.CORPORATE_FLAG, ST_CCRM_PROFILES.DEFERRAL_NET_VALUE, ST_CCRM_PROFILES.FORECAST_INVALID_FLAG, ST_CCRM_PROFILES.CUSTOMER_ID, ST_CCRM_PROFILES.CUSTOMER_NAME, ST_CCRM_PROFILES.LEGACY_FLAG, ST_CCRM_PROFILES.FORECAST_SUBMIT_FLAG, ST_CCRM_PROFILES.FCST_LAST_UPDATED_BY, CAST(ST_CCRM_PROFILES.FCST_LAST_UPDATE_DATE AS TIMESTAMP(0)) FCST_LAST_UPDATE_DATE, ST_CCRM_PROFILES.MERGED_FLAG, ST_CCRM_PROFILES.PROFILE_CATG, ST_CCRM_PROFILES.DISCRIMINATOR, ST_CCRM_PROFILES.SYSTEMATIC_HOLD, ST_CCRM_PROFILES.DEFER_PERCENT, ST_CCRM_PROFILES.ASSIGNED_ON, ST_CCRM_PROFILES.CATEGORY_CD, ST_CCRM_PROFILES.COGS_IMPACT, ST_CCRM_PROFILES.OPERATING_UNIT, ST_CCRM_PROFILES.SALES_SEGMENT, ST_CCRM_PROFILES.ACCOUNTING_RULE, ST_CCRM_PROFILES.JOIN_DEAL, CAST(ST_CCRM_PROFILES.DEAL_EXP_DATE AS TIMESTAMP(0)) DEAL_EXP_DATE, ST_CCRM_PROFILES.GLOBAL, ST_CCRM_PROFILES.ORIGINATING_LOCAL, ST_CCRM_PROFILES.ORIGIN_DL_PRO_CREATED, ST_CCRM_PROFILES.ORIGINATING_PROFILE_ID, ST_CCRM_PROFILES.ORIGINATING_DEAL_ID, ST_CCRM_PROFILES.REFERENCE_ID, ST_CCRM_PROFILES.REFERENCE_NAME, ST_CCRM_PROFILES.REFERENCE_VALUE, ST_CCRM_PROFILES.REOPEN_REASON_CODE, ST_CCRM_PROFILES.ACK_PROFILE_STATUS, ST_CCRM_PROFILES.ACCRULE_UPDATED_BY, ST_CCRM_PROFILES.TRANSACTION_LEVEL, ST_CCRM_PROFILES.REVENUE_RULE, ST_CCRM_PROFILES.SALES_INSEN_PROG, CAST(ST_CCRM_PROFILES.EXP_REV_REG_DATE AS TIMESTAMP(0)) EXP_REV_REG_DATE , ST_CCRM_PROFILES.NS_TERM_SUMMARY, CAST(ST_CCRM_PROFILES.PROFILE_STATUS_DATE AS TIMESTAMP(0)) PROFILE_STATUS_DATE, ST_CCRM_PROFILES.CREATION_DATETIME, ST_CCRM_PROFILES.ACTION_CODE,
'RI' EXCEPTION_TYPE
FROM
$$STGDB.ST_CCRM_PROFILES ST_CCRM_PROFILES
WHERE 
NOT EXISTS
(SELECT
1
FROM
$$WORKDB.W_CCRM_PROFILE WCP
where  WCP.BK_CCRM_PROFILE_ID_INT  = ST_CCRM_PROFILES.PROFILE_ID)

SELECT
WCP.PROFILE_ID BK_CCRM_PROFILE_ID_INT,
WCP.AGREEMENT_NAME AGREEMENT_NAME,
WCP.PROFILE_STATUS PROFILE_STATUS_CD,
WCP.COGS_IMPACT COGD_IMPACT_FLG,
WCP.CUSTOMER_NAME SOURCE_REPORTED_CATEGORY_CD,
WCP.PROFILE_TYPE  PROFILE_PRODUCT_CATEGORY_CD,
WCP.PROFILE_STATUS_DATE PROFILE_STATUS_CHANGE_DT,
WCP.PROFILE_SOURCE PROFILE_SOURCE_CD,
WCP.REVREC_STATUS  REVENUE_RECOGNITION_STATUS_CD,
WCP.NS_TERM_SUMMARY NON_STANDARD_TERMS_SUMMARY_TXT,
WCP.COMPLETENESS_FLAG COMPLETENESS_FLG,
(CASE WHEN (WCP.REFERENCE_NAME IS NULL or WCP.REFERENCE_NAME = 'UNKNOWN') THEN 'N'
      ELSE 'Y' END) AS WITH_REFERENCE_ROLE,
(CASE WHEN WCP.ORIGINATING_DEAL_ID IS NULL THEN 'N'
      ELSE 'Y' END) AS WITH_ORIGINATING_DEAL_ROLE,
 (CASE WHEN (WCP.REFERENCE_NAME = 'DEAL ID' OR WCP.REFERENCE_NAME =  'UNKNOWN')  THEN 'Y'
      ELSE 'N' END) AS WITH_DEAL_ROLE,     
WCP.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY SALES_TERRITORY_KEY,
WCP.OPERATING_UNIT OPERATING_UNIT_NAME_CD,
WCP.RU_ORIGINATING_OPPORTUNITY_KEY RU_ORIGINATING_OPPORTUNITY_KEY,
WCP.RU_OPPORTUNITY_KEY RU_OPPORTUNITY_KEY,
WCP.REFERENCE_NAME RU_REFERENCE_TYPE_CD,
WCP.REFERENCE_VALUE RU_SRC_RPRTD_REF_VALUE_NAME,
WCP.DEAL_EXP_DATE RU_DEAL_EXPIRATION_DT,
WCP.JOIN_DEAL BU_JOINT_DEAL_FLG,
WCP.ACCOUNTING_RULE ACCOUNTING_SCOPE_SUMMARY_CD,
WCP.ACTION_CODE  ACTION_CODE,
WCP.ACTION_CODE DML_TYPE
FROM
(

SELECT
SSCP.PROFILE_ID,
COALESCE(SSCP.AGREEMENT_NAME,'UNKNOWN') AGREEMENT_NAME,
COALESCE(SSCP.PROFILE_STATUS,'UNKNOWN') PROFILE_STATUS,
COALESCE(SSCP.COGS_IMPACT,'=') COGS_IMPACT,
COALESCE(SSCP.CUSTOMER_NAME,'UNKNOWN') CUSTOMER_NAME,
COALESCE(SSCP.PROFILE_TYPE,'UNKNOWN') PROFILE_TYPE,
SSCP.PROFILE_STATUS_DATE,
COALESCE(SSCP.PROFILE_SOURCE,'UNKNOWN')  PROFILE_SOURCE,
COALESCE(SSCP.REVREC_STATUS,'UNKNOWN') REVREC_STATUS,
COALESCE(SSCP.NS_TERM_SUMMARY,'UNKNOWN') NS_TERM_SUMMARY ,
COALESCE(SSCP.COMPLETENESS_FLAG,'=') COMPLETENESS_FLAG,
COALESCE(SSCP.REFERENCE_NAME,'UNKNOWN') REFERENCE_NAME,
COALESCE(SSCP.ORIGINATING_DEAL_ID,-999) ORIGINATING_DEAL_ID,
COALESCE(STT.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY,-999) SALES_TERRITORY_KEY,
COALESCE(SSCP.OPERATING_UNIT,'UNKNOWN') OPERATING_UNIT,
COALESCE(MINIMUM(SDNO.OPPORTUNITY_KEY),-999) RU_ORIGINATING_OPPORTUNITY_KEY,
COALESCE(MINIMUM(SNO.OPPORTUNITY_KEY),-999) RU_OPPORTUNITY_KEY,
COALESCE(SSCP.REFERENCE_VALUE,'UNKNOWN') REFERENCE_VALUE,
SSCP.DEAL_EXP_DATE,
COALESCE(SSCP.JOIN_DEAL,'=') JOIN_DEAL,
COALESCE(SSCP.ACCOUNTING_RULE, 'UNKNOWN') ACCOUNTING_RULE,
SSCP.ACTION_CODE
FROM
$$STGDB.ST_CCRM_PROFILES SSCP 
LEFT OUTER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_OPPORTUNITY  SDNO  ON SSCP.ORIGINATING_DEAL_ID = SDNO.DV_DEAL_ID_INT 
LEFT OUTER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_OPPORTUNITY SNO ON SSCP.GLOBAL_DEAL_ID = SNO.DV_DEAL_ID_INT 
LEFT OUTER JOIN (SELECT EL_TBL.AREA_ID AREA_ID, EL_TBL.NODE_ID NODE_ID,  SALES_TERRITORY_KEY, NST.HIERARCHY_TYPE_CODE  
FROM $$ETLVWDB.EL_SALES_TERRITORY NST,
   (SELECT B.AREA_ID, A.NODE_ID NODE_ID, A.STRUCTURE_NODE_NAME RU_EXTERNAL_THEATER_NAME, B.AREA_NAME BK_SALES_TERRITORY_NAME_CODE,
     B.THEATER_ID THEATER_ID FROM  $$ETLVWDB.EL_CCRM_SHARE_HIERARCHY A, $$ETLVWDB.EL_CCRM_THEATER_AREA_MAP B
     WHERE A.NODE_ID = B.THEATER_ID) EL_TBL
     WHERE NST.TERRITORY_ID = EL_TBL.AREA_ID
     AND NST.GLOBAL_NAME = 'UO'
     AND NST.HIERARCHY_TYPE_CODE = 'CORP. REVENUE' )  STT
ON
SSCP.THEATER_ID  = STT.NODE_ID
AND
SSCP.AREA_ID =  STT.AREA_ID
GROUP BY 
SSCP.PROFILE_ID,
AGREEMENT_NAME,
 PROFILE_STATUS,
 COGS_IMPACT,
 CUSTOMER_NAME,
PROFILE_TYPE,
SSCP.PROFILE_STATUS_DATE,
 PROFILE_SOURCE,
 REVREC_STATUS,
 NS_TERM_SUMMARY ,
COMPLETENESS_FLAG,
 REFERENCE_NAME,
 ORIGINATING_DEAL_ID,
STT.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY,
 OPERATING_UNIT,
 REFERENCE_VALUE,
SSCP.DEAL_EXP_DATE,
JOIN_DEAL,
ACCOUNTING_RULE,
SSCP.ACTION_CODE) WCP
UNION ALL
SELECT
WCP.PROFILE_ID BK_CCRM_PROFILE_ID_INT,
WCP.AGREEMENT_NAME AGREEMENT_NAME,
WCP.PROFILE_STATUS PROFILE_STATUS_CD,
WCP.COGS_IMPACT COGD_IMPACT_FLG,
WCP.CUSTOMER_NAME SOURCE_REPORTED_CATEGORY_CD,
WCP.PROFILE_TYPE  PROFILE_PRODUCT_CATEGORY_CD,
WCP.PROFILE_STATUS_DATE PROFILE_STATUS_CHANGE_DT,
WCP.PROFILE_SOURCE PROFILE_SOURCE_CD,
WCP.REVREC_STATUS  REVENUE_RECOGNITION_STATUS_CD,
WCP.NS_TERM_SUMMARY NON_STANDARD_TERMS_SUMMARY_TXT,
WCP.COMPLETENESS_FLAG COMPLETENESS_FLG,
(CASE WHEN (WCP.REFERENCE_NAME IS NULL or WCP.REFERENCE_NAME = 'UNKNOWN') THEN 'N'
      ELSE 'Y' END) AS WITH_REFERENCE_ROLE,
(CASE WHEN WCP.ORIGINATING_DEAL_ID IS NULL THEN 'N'
      ELSE 'Y' END) AS WITH_ORIGINATING_DEAL_ROLE,
 (CASE WHEN (WCP.REFERENCE_NAME = 'DEAL ID' OR WCP.REFERENCE_NAME =  'UNKNOWN')  THEN 'Y'
      ELSE 'N' END) AS WITH_DEAL_ROLE,     
WCP.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY SALES_TERRITORY_KEY,
WCP.OPERATING_UNIT OPERATING_UNIT_NAME_CD,
WCP.RU_ORIGINATING_OPPORTUNITY_KEY RU_ORIGINATING_OPPORTUNITY_KEY,
WCP.RU_OPPORTUNITY_KEY RU_OPPORTUNITY_KEY,
WCP.REFERENCE_NAME RU_REFERENCE_TYPE_CD,
WCP.REFERENCE_VALUE RU_SRC_RPRTD_REF_VALUE_NAME,
WCP.DEAL_EXP_DATE RU_DEAL_EXPIRATION_DT,
WCP.JOIN_DEAL BU_JOINT_DEAL_FLG,
WCP.ACCOUNTING_RULE ACCOUNTING_SCOPE_SUMMARY_CD,
WCP.ACTION_CODE  ACTION_CODE,
WCP.ACTION_CODE DML_TYPE
FROM
(
SELECT
SSCP.PROFILE_ID,
COALESCE(SSCP.AGREEMENT_NAME,'UNKNOWN') AGREEMENT_NAME,
COALESCE(SSCP.PROFILE_STATUS,'UNKNOWN') PROFILE_STATUS,
COALESCE(SSCP.COGS_IMPACT,'=') COGS_IMPACT,
COALESCE(SSCP.CUSTOMER_NAME,'UNKNOWN') CUSTOMER_NAME,
COALESCE(SSCP.PROFILE_TYPE,'UNKNOWN') PROFILE_TYPE,
SSCP.PROFILE_STATUS_DATE,
COALESCE(SSCP.PROFILE_SOURCE,'UNKNOWN')  PROFILE_SOURCE,
COALESCE(SSCP.REVREC_STATUS,'UNKNOWN') REVREC_STATUS,
SSCP.NS_TERM_SUMMARY,
COALESCE(SSCP.COMPLETENESS_FLAG,'=') COMPLETENESS_FLAG,
COALESCE(SSCP.REFERENCE_NAME,'UNKNOWN') REFERENCE_NAME,
COALESCE(SSCP.ORIGINATING_DEAL_ID,-999) ORIGINATING_DEAL_ID,
COALESCE(STT.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY,-999) SALES_TERRITORY_KEY,
COALESCE(SSCP.OPERATING_UNIT,'UNKNOWN') OPERATING_UNIT,
COALESCE(MINIMUM(SDNO.OPPORTUNITY_KEY),-999) RU_ORIGINATING_OPPORTUNITY_KEY,
COALESCE(MINIMUM(SNO.OPPORTUNITY_KEY),-999) RU_OPPORTUNITY_KEY,
COALESCE(SSCP.REFERENCE_VALUE,'UNKNOWN') REFERENCE_VALUE,
SSCP.DEAL_EXP_DATE,
COALESCE(SSCP.JOIN_DEAL,'=') JOIN_DEAL,
COALESCE(SSCP.ACCOUNTING_RULE, 'UNKNOWN') ACCOUNTING_RULE,
SSCP.ACTION_CODE
FROM
$$EXCEPDB.EX_CCRM_PROFILES SSCP 
LEFT OUTER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_OPPORTUNITY  SDNO  ON SSCP.ORIGINATING_DEAL_ID = SDNO.DV_DEAL_ID_INT 
LEFT OUTER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_OPPORTUNITY SNO ON SSCP.GLOBAL_DEAL_ID = SNO.DV_DEAL_ID_INT 
LEFT OUTER JOIN (SELECT EL_TBL.AREA_ID AREA_ID, EL_TBL.NODE_ID NODE_ID,  SALES_TERRITORY_KEY, NST.HIERARCHY_TYPE_CODE  
	 FROM $$ETLVWDB.EL_SALES_TERRITORY NST,
    (SELECT B.AREA_ID, A.NODE_ID NODE_ID, A.STRUCTURE_NODE_NAME RU_EXTERNAL_THEATER_NAME, B.AREA_NAME BK_SALES_TERRITORY_NAME_CODE,
     B.THEATER_ID THEATER_ID FROM  $$ETLVWDB.EL_CCRM_SHARE_HIERARCHY A, $$ETLVWDB.EL_CCRM_THEATER_AREA_MAP B
     WHERE A.NODE_ID = B.THEATER_ID) EL_TBL
     WHERE NST.TERRITORY_ID = EL_TBL.AREA_ID
     AND NST.GLOBAL_NAME = 'UO'
     AND NST.HIERARCHY_TYPE_CODE = 'CORP. REVENUE' )  STT
ON
SSCP.THEATER_ID  = STT.NODE_ID
AND
SSCP.AREA_ID =  STT.AREA_ID 
 GROUP BY 
SSCP.PROFILE_ID,
AGREEMENT_NAME,
 PROFILE_STATUS,
 COGS_IMPACT,
 CUSTOMER_NAME,
PROFILE_TYPE,
SSCP.PROFILE_STATUS_DATE,
 PROFILE_SOURCE,
 REVREC_STATUS,
 NS_TERM_SUMMARY ,
COMPLETENESS_FLAG,
 REFERENCE_NAME,
 ORIGINATING_DEAL_ID,
STT.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY,
 OPERATING_UNIT,
 REFERENCE_VALUE,
SSCP.DEAL_EXP_DATE,
JOIN_DEAL,
ACCOUNTING_RULE,
SSCP.ACTION_CODE) WCP
